findings.comment: T005 is marked done on an annotated green-with-reason fixture, but the test only checks for the string [annotated]. The implementation never extracts or prints the annotation reason: lint-self-leak.ps1 stores only the deny-list reason and emits "[annotated] file:line matched (class)". This means a regression that omits the human audit reason from the legitimate path still passes, falsifying the claimed transparency/paired-test evidence for annotated escapes.
